app.name: Panorama
app.tagline: One pane of glass for IT assets and fleet.
login.title: Sign in to Panorama
login.subtitle.invitation: Sign in to accept your invitation.
invitation.accept.token_missing.title: Invitation token missing
invitation.accept.token_missing.body: The invitation link is incomplete. Ask your admin to resend the invitation.
invitation.accept.unverified.title: Invitation could not be verified
invitation.accept.unverified.body: Panorama couldn't reach the invitation service. Please retry.
invitation.accept.invalid.expired.title: Invitation expired
invitation.accept.invalid.expired.body: Ask your admin for a new invitation.
invitation.accept.invalid.revoked.title: Invitation revoked
invitation.accept.invalid.revoked.body: This invitation was revoked by an admin.
invitation.accept.invalid.already_accept: This invitation has already been accepted — try signing in instead.
invitation.accept.invalid.not_found.body: Ask your admin for a new invitation.
invitation.accept.email_mismatch.title: Wrong account for this invitation
invitation.accept.email_mismatch.body.su: . Log out and try again with the invited email — Panorama never auto-accepts an invitation for a different address.
invitation.accept.ready.title: Join {{tenantName}}
invitation.accept.error.email_mismatch: The invitation email does not match your session.
invitation.accept.error.invalid: This invitation is no longer valid.
invitation.accept.error.generic: Could not accept the invitation. Please try again.
invitation.list.title: Invitations
invitation.send.title: Send invitation
invitation.send.help: The invited address gets a single-use acceptance link. Default TTL is 7 days; bound is 1 day to 30 days. Same email + same tenant can't have two open invitations at once — revoke or wait for the old one to expire first.
invitation.action.resend.help: Re-queue the acceptance email. The token is unchanged.
invitation.banner.resent: Resent — the email is back in the queue.
invitation.revoke.confirm_title: Revoke this invitation? The token becomes unusable.
invitation.error.tenant_mismatch: Invitation belongs to a different tenant.
invitation.error.role_not_allowed: This role can't be invited via the public flow.
invitation.error.duplicate_open: An open invitation for this email already exists in this tenant. Revoke it first or wait for it to expire.
invitation.error.rate_limit_admin: You've sent too many invitations recently. Wait a bit and try again.
invitation.error.rate_limit_tenant: This tenant has hit its daily invitation limit. Try again tomorrow.
invitation.error.ttl_out_of_bounds: Expiry must be between 1 day and 30 days.
invitation.error.terminal: This invitation is already accepted, revoked, or expired.
invitation.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
blackout.list.title: Blackouts
blackout.create.title: Create blackout
blackout.create.help: Creating a blackout doesn't retroactively cancel existing reservations in the window — handle those manually if needed.
blackout.field.title: Title
blackout.column.title: Title
blackout.delete.confirm_title: Delete this blackout? This is permanent.
blackout.delete.confirm_checkbox: I confirm — delete the blackout window
blackout.error.asset_not_found: Asset not found in this tenant.
blackout.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to do that.
reservation.overdue.checked_out_title: Checked out past end time — driver hasn't returned the asset yet. Sweep flagged it for ops attention.
reservation.overdue.no_show_title: Driver never picked up the asset within the pickup window. Auto-flipped to MISSED by the sweep.
reservation.action.reject.note_label: Reason — required, shown to the requester.
reservation.action.reject.note_placehold: Why is this reservation being rejected?
reservation.action.note_required_error: A reason is required when rejecting.
reservation.approvalNote.label: Note from approver:
inspection.review_note_placeholder: Body shop scheduled, expected return date, …
inspection.summary_note_placeholder: Anything else the next driver should know
inspection.photo.upload_aborted: Cancelled — pick a file to retry.
inspection.photo.help: JPEG/PNG/WebP/HEIC, max 10 MB. Server strips EXIF + re-encodes before storing.
inspection.photo.error.too_large_pixels: Photo dimensions exceed the safe limit.
inspection.photo.error.unsupported_media: File type not supported. Use JPEG / PNG / WebP / HEIC.
inspection.photo.error.processing_failed: Could not process the photo. Try a different file.
inspection.photo.error.cap_reached: This inspection has reached its photo limit.
inspection.error.required_items_missing: Some required items are missing answers.
inspection.error.inspection_not_in_progr: This inspection has already been completed or cancelled.
inspection.error.no_template_for_asset: No inspection template exists for this asset's category.
inspection.template.divergence_banner: Template has been edited since this inspection started (snapshot preserved).
inspection.tether.required: An inspection is required before checkout.
inspection.template.item.label: Label
maintenance.list.title: Maintenance
maintenance.column.title: Title
maintenance.field.title: Title
maintenance.confirm.complete: Mark this ticket COMPLETED? Asset returns to READY when no other open tickets remain.
maintenance.confirm.cancel: Cancel this ticket? Asset returns to READY when no other open tickets remain.
maintenance.detail.title: Ticket detail
maintenance.banner.completed: Ticket completed; asset returned to READY where applicable.
maintenance.error.admin_required: Admin role required for this action.
maintenance.error.admin_required_for_ass: Only admins can pre-assign a ticket. Open it without an assignee, then admin can re-assign.
maintenance.error.admin_or_assignee_requ: Only the assignee or an admin can move work forward.
maintenance.error.asset_not_found: Asset not found in this tenant.
maintenance.error.reservation_asset_mism: Triggering reservation doesn't match the chosen asset.
maintenance.error.not_reservation_owner: You can only open a ticket from a reservation you own.
maintenance.error.assignee_not_in_tenant: Selected assignee is not an active member of this tenant.
maintenance.error.invalid_transition: That status change isn't allowed from the current state.
maintenance.error.completion_fields_only: Completion fields are only accepted when transitioning to COMPLETED.
maintenance.error.title_too_short: Title must be at least 3 characters.
